summary: Frontend-only smoke + integration testing of 3 new Knowledge Base landing pages: /manufacturing-mastery-series, /downloadables, /manufacturing-metrics. All 5 review criteria pass with 0 console errors.

1_mastery_series.h1: 15 deep dives. / One operational thesis at a time.
1_mastery_series.notes: All 15 pillar + 145 part anchors have target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer, and href starting with https://www.thepowerscompany.com/resources/. Console errors: 0.

2_downloadables.h1: Field-ready tools. / Built for the floor.
2_downloadables.notes: All 16 card anchors point to https://www.thepowerscompany.com/wp-content/uploads/ with target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer. After scroll + 2.5s wait, .brief-doc-station has .is-in and .dl-card clip-path resolves to visible inset state (not the initial inset-with-100%-right). Console errors: 0.

3_kpis.h1: The metrics that move. / Operations leaders actually use.
3_kpis.formula_font_family: SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, Liberation Mono, monospace
3_kpis.notes: Rail click triggers smooth window.scrollTo and is-active updates as the IntersectionObserver fires. On the test viewport (1920x4000) the active section can land one item ahead because the rootMargin '-40% 0px -45% 0px' active band sits at viewport y≈1600-2200, which is below the section just scrolled to (top=130). On real viewports (~900px tall) this resolves to the expected section. Not a bug. Console errors: 0.

critical_code_review_comments: KPIs.jsx StickyNav IntersectionObserver rootMargin '-40% 0px -45% 0px' is sensitive to viewport height — on tall viewports (>2000px) the active band can drift one section ahead after a click. Consider clamping the active section to the clicked one for a short window after the jump (debounced setActive override) for a cleaner UX, but functional today.
Downloadables.jsx uses 'wipe-d1..wipe-d4' staggered on index % 5 — index 0 maps to '' (no delay bucket) which is fine but mildly asymmetric. Cosmetic only.
MasterySeries.jsx pillar image alt is empty (alt='') by design — acceptable since the link's aria-label carries the meaningful description.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 KB pages render correctly, all legacy WP URLs are preserved with target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer, the KPI sticky-rail scroll-spy + smooth-scroll work, Downloadables wipe clip-path animation completes after IntersectionObserver fires, and the /insights hub correctly wires its 3 internal cards to the new SPA routes (FAQs + Glossary remain external). No console errors on any of the 3 pages.
